desc: Easter brunch at OKANA's Jack Rabbit restaurant. Seasonal brunch favorites, chef-driven entrees, and decadent desserts with Easter Bunny appearance. 11 AM–3 PM. Ticketed.

name: OKANA Beach Opens — Outdoor Waterpark Season
venue: OKANA Resort & Indoor Waterpark, 639 First Americans Blvd, OKC
desc: OKANA Beach outdoor waterpark opens for the 2026 season. High-speed slides, zip line splash landing, lazy river, beach-entry pool, inflatable obstacle course, and swim-up bar. Day passes available.

Farmers market 9AM-1PM, pedal boats & kayak 10AM-8PM, roller skating, OKC Kids Market 4-8PM, live evening entertainment: OK3, Bailey Rae, Ricochet, Kaitlin Butts, Neon Night drone show. Presented by Visit OKC. kickiniton66.com
